CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. (212)

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-20-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Continued To May-08-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of And Motion For Protective Order To Quash Or Modify Subpoena; Exhibits
Off Calendar Apr-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Linda Samoyoa's Motion For Protective Order To Quash Or Modify Subpoenas is granted as it seeks to modify the subpoenas. Each subpoena is limited to records since 1993. Each subpoena is further limited to treatment of muscular or skeletal complaints relating to the neck, skull, spine and upper extremities; and treatment for complaints of pain or discomfort in the area of the neck, skull, spine and upper extremities resulting from physical injury. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
